case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. GLORIA R HENRY

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-15-2025 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
